sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move to position 2
action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])

# Measure pos 2 cycle
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
lower_p_tile = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] > 100][0]
children = [nodes[cid] for cid in lower_p_tile['children']]
children_sorted = sorted(children, key=lambda n: n['boundary'][0][1])

pos2_start = children_sorted[2]['hash']
print(f"Pos 2 start: {pos2_start[:12]}")

# Cycle through 7 states
pos2_cycle = []
for i in range(7):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    lower_p_tile = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] > 100][0]
    children = [nodes[cid] for cid in lower_p_tile['children']]
    children_sorted = sorted(children, key=lambda n: n['boundary'][0][1])
    c = children_sorted[2]
    pos2_cycle.append((c['hash'], c['pixels']))
    action(['UP'])

print("\nPos 2 cycle:")
upper_pink = ['cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'fb80c9b281b063da', 'f4469c244897540c', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 'b4edb3faf810133b']
for i, (h, px) in enumerate(pos2_cycle):
    match = 'YES' if h in upper_pink else 'NO'
    print(f"  State {i}: {h[:12]} ({px}px) {match}")

# Check current state after 7 UPs (should be back to start)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
lower_p_tile = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] > 100][0]
children = [nodes[cid] for cid in lower_p_tile['children']]
children_sorted = sorted(children, key=lambda n: n['boundary'][0][1])
curr = children_sorted[2]['hash']
print(f"\nAfter 7 UPs: {curr[:12]} (should be {pos2_start[:12]})")

# Find upper pink matches in pos 2 cycle
pos2_hashes = [h for h, px in pos2_cycle]
matches = [(i, h) for i, h in enumerate(pos2_hashes) if h in upper_pink]
print(f"\nUpper pink matches in pos 2: {matches}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
